commands.notes: Verifies stale-branch candidate selection, deletion guardrails, and workflow trigger posture.
Confirms the existing quality workflow contract still passes after adding the standalone branch-hygiene workflow.
Validates task-packet template posture for the repo governance change.
Confirms the fallback workflow change does not regress duplication gate expectations.

affectedSubgraph: push|schedule|workflow_dispatch -> branch-hygiene workflow -> GitHub pull request history -> remote branch deletion
graphChecks.notes: This change is repository-governance only and stays within GitHub workflow orchestration plus the dedicated cleanup script.

runtimeGap: Hosted GitHub workflow execution and live branch deletion still require post-push verification against the real repository.
knownGaps: The initial local run does not prove hosted GitHub API behavior for slash-containing branch names.
Final proof still depends on a real closed-PR residue branch being cleaned by the hosted workflow.
